info.title: UCP Common Service
info.description:
Canonical MCP/JSON-RPC interface for UCP Common services, including Location discovery. Schema references are logical pointers - actual payload shape is determined by negotiated capabilities.

**Endpoint Resolution:** This spec defines methods only. The endpoint URL MUST be obtained from the merchant's discovery profile at `/.well-known/ucp` under `services["dev.ucp.common"][transport=mcp].endpoint`. The server entry below is a placeholder for tooling compatibility.

servers.name: business
servers.description: Business-provided endpoint from UCP discovery profile

meta.description: Request metadata mapping to UCP standard headers.

ucp-agent.description: Platform agent identification. Maps to HTTP UCP-Agent header.

profile.description: URL to the platform's UCP profile document.

idempotency-key.description: Unique key for retry safety. Maps to HTTP Idempotency-Key header (optional for read-only operations).

signature.description: Detached JWS signature in format `<base64url-header>..<base64url-signature>` for message integrity.

methods.name: search_locations
methods.description: Search for physical locations (e.g., retail stores, restaurants) using query text, filters, and geo proximity.

methods.name: lookup_locations
methods.description: Batch lookup of physical locations by their stable identifiers. Returns matching locations and warnings.
